description:
Why does ranked not deal with cheaters this blatant? Like how can cheaters like this going 16-4 hiding nothing at all result in no bans after previously being flagged for cheating? How can Battleye not spot this?

I don't mean to talk on behalf of all players here but the fact that Battleye doesn't pick up on things like this is an absolute joke, ruining the actual gaming experience for everyone. Being a good game with an atrocious anti-cheat completely discredits any sort of enjoyment that an average player can get from playing this game and it is awful considering how much time and money people dedicate to this game.

Tabstats (previously flagged for cheating 6 days ago yet still playing) : https://tabstats.com/siege/player/rqzn/b1720195-245a-493c-b957-a536516a0166
Tracker: https://r6.tracker.network/profile/pc/Rqzn./

Clip 1: Rqzn. in-game name, with his nickname being RQZN.M80***
Clip 2: Rqzn. previously flagged for cheating 6 days ago yet STILL NOT BANNED?
Clip 3: Prefire with absolutely no visible movement, clearly walling and basing aim and prefire off of impossible intel
Clip 4: An ENTIRE ENCOUNTER WHERE WALLS ARE CLEARLY BLATANT. Walling and staring at IQ then AIMING AT MONTAGNE THROUGH WALLS
Clip 5: No words needed. Blatantly walling with no intention of stopping nor hiding it.
Clip 6: Walling prefire number 2, absolute joke.
Clip 7: Tried to wallhack floorbang but lagged out mid-way through.

latest_comment.message: This user is already banned.

description:
Ignore the convos in the back in one of the clips i dont know how to cut it out lol.
So basically my friend is in a team discord server and he invited me so we could 2v2 this other person.
His stats were a little sus because he is a 1.8 emerald with 99 matches.
So we were a little concerned about that but we moved past it.
But then when we were playing the match his movement and game awareness/game sens was not matching his k/d ratio or gunskill.
Then he was tracing through walls and his reaction time was fast.
We tried to catch him out by asking him a few questions>
I know a little about how cheats work so i was wondering if his cheats were stream proof we asked him to screen share which took some convincing but he eventually done it but then i thought that he could be sharing his game and not his whole screen but then he refused to share his whole screen which was sus because if he could share his game screen then he could share his whole screen there is more evidence in the clips i have sent to you.
Hope you can do something about this because im getting tired of cheaters taking my elo in ranked and i want there to be less cheaters in the r6 community thanks for your time!

latest_comment.message: This report does not include enough evidence for a ban. Please re-submit the report with more evidence.

description: My FPS Dipped down to 2 and i managed to hit him, meanwhile he randomly saw my teammate, without any intel, he never saw me at all, and he ended up going over to stairs and i wasnt making any sound and managed to headshot me while speeding, blantently. He continued to wall through the entire game after losing 3 - 0, they toggled midgame
